title: Reproducibility archive for "Missing Physics Discovery through Fully Differentiable Finite Element-Based Machine Learning"
description: Firedrake patches (against pinned public commits) and the Python scripts, meshes, and data needed to reproduce the numerical examples of the paper "Missing Physics Discovery through Fully Differentiable Finite Element-Based Machine Learning".
